commit.message:
Optimize timeline overlap detection and harden tests (#109)

* Initial plan

* perf: optimize timeline overlap detection

* perf: replace active.shift() with index pointer in detectParallelIds

shift() is O(n) because it shifts all elements left. Using a front
pointer that advances past expired spans avoids this cost, improving
eviction from O(n) to O(1) per span.

Also restores JSDoc documenting the sweep-line algorithm and NaN
filtering behavior.

fix(protocol): preserve registry entry order with IndexMap

The RegistryMap inner type was HashMap<String, serde_json::Value> which
has non-deterministic iteration order (Rust's RandomState). When
minecraft:dimension_type entries were sent in random order during
configuration, the hardcoded dimension_type_id=0 in the login packet
would randomly map to the wrong dimension type (e.g. the_nether with
min_y=0 and no skylight instead of overworld with min_y=-64).

This caused intermittent startup issues where:
- Chunks appeared to start from Y=0 instead of Y=-64
- Skybox rendering was wrong
- Blocks were not breakable

The fix:
1. Replace inner HashMap with IndexMap to preserve JSON insertion order
   (matching vanilla's registration order)
2. Add get_registry_entry_index() to look up entry indices by name
3. Replace hardcoded dimension_type_id=0 with dynamic lookup

BREAKING CHANGE: indexmap workspace dep now requires serde feature

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(world): implement block tag loading from vanilla data (R5.3)

Add compile-time block tag registry generated by build.rs from vanilla
tags.json and custom Oxidized tag files. Tags are stored as static
sorted arrays enabling O(log n) membership testing with zero startup
cost.

Vanilla tags: 248 block tags loaded from tags.json (produced by
bundle_tags.py), containing block type IDs for categories like
minecraft:doors, minecraft:beds, minecraft:replaceable, etc.

Custom Oxidized tags (4):
- oxidized:interactable (33 blocks) — crafting tables, furnaces, etc.
- oxidized:wall_mountable (64 blocks) — buttons, wall torches, etc.
- oxidized:player_direction (130 blocks) — beds, doors, stairs, etc.
- oxidized:tall_plants (8 blocks) — sunflower, tall_grass, etc.

Public API: BlockTags (zero-sized) with contains(), get(), tag_count(),
tag_names(). TagSet wraps sorted slice with O(log n) contains().

17 unit tests + 3 doc tests verify vanilla/custom tag membership,
positive/negative checks, sort invariants, and unknown tag handling.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
